songs.title: Love Like This
songs.text:
Am6 = 5x455x
Am/B = 7x755x
C#m7 = x46454
F#dim7/E = 0x424x
Esus2/G# = 4x445x

{Intro}
||: F#dim7/E E | Esus2/G# | Am6 | Am/B :||

{A}
F#dim7/E E | Esus2/G# | AM7 | Am6
>Feeling |more than perfect, |amazing |more than words can
Esus2/G# | C#m7 | F#m7 | Am/B
>explain it's |purest form of |reality |divinity
F#dim7/E E | Esus2/G# | AM7 | Am6
>I've been |suffering in this |tiring |crazy world like I'm
Esus2/G# | C#m7 | F#m7 | G#7(b13)
>drowning|there's no way to |escape I thought but| finally here I am

{B}
C#m7 | G#m7 | F#m7 A/B | EM7
>I'll never find another| love like this, it's true | I'll never find another | love like this
D#m7(b5) G#7 | C#m7 E/B | Bbm7(b5) | Am7 G#7(b13)
>Baby, can you feel it| too just like I do? |Who does pa-|  radise belong to
C#m7 | G#m7 | F#m7 A/B | EM7
>I'll never find another| love like this, I know | I'll never find another | love like this
C#m7 | G#m7 C#7(b9) | F#7sus4 F#7 | A/B Am/B ||
>Baby, can I give it to you? |Just like you do |Then we share it  |too

{음절 방식 예시}
[C#m7]이렇게 쓰면 [G#m7]음절 위에 [F#m7]코드가 [B7]붙어요
